## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call to explore GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing automation platform for Screenloop's potential use.](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-driven content creation with human expert oversight, focusing on SEO/AEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Pricing: $20K 8-week strategy sprint, then $15K/month for 12-month growth execution ($180K/year)](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Current capabilities center on editorial content and some programmatic SEO, with plans to expand offerings](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Joao expressed interest but wants more clarity on product roadmap and future capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

## Topics

### Screenloop's Content Marketing Needs

  - [Approaching 4 customers and $6M ARR, seeking to supercharge growth](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Looking for best vendor to automate content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Aiming for lean marketing team (3-5 people) post-Series A](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Want to avoid agencies/freelancers, prefer automated solution](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [AI-powered platform with human expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Services include strategy, content creation, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Focus on SEO and AI-driven search optimization (AEO)](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Notable clients: Ramp, Webflow, Augment Code](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [\~$7M ARR, Series A funded by Madrona](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)

### Platform Capabilities

  - [AI workflows for article generation, research, fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [Human experts review and refine AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [Current focus: Editorial content and some programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Future plans to expand into other content marketing areas](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)

### Pricing and Contract Structure

  - [8-week strategy sprint: $20K fixed fee](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [12-month growth execution: $15K/month ($180K/year)](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [All-inclusive pricing (content creation, publishing, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)

### Differentiation from Agencies

  - [Proprietary AI software integrated with expert human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Team includes former leaders from TechCrunch, Fanatics, TripAdvisor](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Systematic approach to content creation and SEO/AEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to send calendar invite for follow-up in 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
  - [Tyler to provide more clarity on product roadmap if possible](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=1914.0)
  - [Joao to evaluate other vendors and determine if GrowthX warrants further exploration](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
  - [Potential future call with GrowthX CEO Marcel if Screenloop remains interested](https://fathom.video/share/yKATQqyZHeYgmxgoW74R3qX6iXeWHjM6?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)
